title: Update columns value for multiple items at once using mutation
excerpt: Hello, is there any way that I can update a certain columns for a few items at once without inserting the Item ID in query mutation?

posts.author: hakimrazali (muhammad hakim razali)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, is there any way that I can update a certain columns for a few items at once without inserting the Item ID in query mutation?

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @hakimrazali,

Welcome to the community!

Since column values are item-specific, you will need to insert an item ID into any of the mutations to update them!

Best,
Rachel

posts.author: hakimrazali (muhammad hakim razali)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @rachelatmonday ,

Thanks for the reply!

Okay understood but is there any other way that I can update columns for 500+ items at once by using mutation?

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Unfortunately, no. All of the mutations to change column values only accept one item ID at a time

You could consider sending multiple mutations in one request, but you’ll definitely need to keep complexity in mind if doing so!
